room.caption: [NightmareG4] Of course you gotta learn how to play after all these hardships you had to go through.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(107) global.mapTeleport=7
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backG6ForgottenIsles backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999 backFollow.image_xscale=2; backFollow.image_yscale=2 backDraw=instance_create(0,0,oG6_CastleBack) backDraw.yStartDraw=207
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(905) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="We gave you a checkpoint there because those jumps may have been rough." signSize=2
stringToShow="To jump, press the jump button." signSize=1
stringToShow="You're doing really well, but keep going!" signSize=1
stringToShow="The next few jumps are a little harder, but we know you can do it!" signSize=2
stringToShow="This jump is tricky. You will need to double jump and then air-dash to make it up that high." signSize=2
stringToShow="You did it, you're so good!" signSize=1
stringToShow="Don't trip on this ledge." signSize=1
stringToShow="Sometimes a platform will be to your left. First jump to that, then keep going right." signSize=2
stringToShow="We know you didn't have a checkpoint for a long while." signSize=1
stringToShow="So we put one there too." signSize=1
stringToShow="Careful, this is an enemy. They can hurt you, but you can also hurt it." signSize=2
stringToShow="Good job! A checkpoint is coming up!" signSize=1
stringToShow="You're a bit over half way there! Keep going, you're doing so great!" signSize=2
GID_SET(346607, self.id) stringToShow="To commemorate this moment, HAVE ALL THESE COOKIES!!" signSize=1
stringToShow="Now wasn't that so much fun?!" signSize=1
stringToShow="This is an organ!#If you made it this far, you already knew that." signSize=2
stringToShow="We had a lot of fun together, but now we must part ways." signSize=2
